hero.title: Master Medical Exams with Confidence
hero.subtitle: Practice thousands of MCQs, simulate real exams, and track your progress like a pro medical student.

targetedTraining.title: Targeted Practice
targetedTraining.description: Access thousands of MCQs organized by subject and difficulty level for a personalized learning experience.

examSimulation.title: Realistic Exam Simulations
examSimulation.description: Prepare effectively with mock exams that replicate real testing conditions and time constraints.

progressTracking.title: Advanced Progress Tracking
progressTracking.description: Monitor your performance, identify weak areas, and track your improvement over time.

detailedExplanations.title: Detailed Explanations
detailedExplanations.description: Learn from every question with clear explanations that help you understand the underlying concepts.

questionBank.title: Extensive Question Bank
questionBank.description: Practice with a large collection of high-quality medical questions covering multiple specialties.
